content.en:
Complete the Golden Body of the Other Side!

Origin Realm Will!

Although they sensed the will of the Origin Realm, they did not sense the complete golden body of the other side.

And the strength of the Lord of the White Capital is stronger than them, so what the Lord of the White Capital says, they naturally believe it.

"This eight-time bone transformation realm actually has mastered the complete golden body transformation and the will of the origin realm, and his strength is indeed no less than that of the ninth bone transformation realm, there is indeed hope that he will pass this assessment, but if he doesn't pass the assessment, should we recruit him?"

"Yes, if he doesn't pass the assessment, it's a pity that such a demonic genius is not recruited!"

"But we can't break the rules, once he doesn't pass the assessment, we can only give up!"

Seeing that these few Origin Realms were discussed, the Lord of the White Capital smiled and said, "You forgot that there is still a special recruitment quota, if he really failed the assessment because of his cultivation problems." I will test his strength individually, and if he meets the criteria, I will apply for a special recruitment spot. "

"That's right, there are also special recruitment quotas, such a terrestrial genius is indeed qualified to use the special recruitment quota!"

Several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors nodded one after another.

......

"The time of an ancient era, the time is very long, it takes such a long time to assess, just to kill a hundred Void Arowanas, presumably the strength of these Void Arowana should be very strong, and it is extremely difficult to kill them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The suppression of the Origin Black River is very strong, and after he enters here, he has been able to withstand the suppression of the Origin Black River all the time.

And.

His perception was also greatly suppressed, making it difficult to sense far away.

Most importantly, the Black River, the origin of this place, can corrode him.

Of course.

This level of corrosion is not too severe, but if you stay for a few primeval eras, it will be more serious.

What's more dangerous is that you have to face the threat of the Void Arowana.

Therefore, it is definitely not easy to complete the assessment of Fengya Island.

And that's just the first assessment, there are others to follow.

If you really want to join Fengya Island, it is definitely a real demon among the geniuses on the other side, so you can hope to join.

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian was constantly looking for the existence of the Void Arowana, and the Void Arowana was not easy to find, so just finding the Void Arowana was a troublesome matter.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian found a Void Arowana.

Bang!!!!

This Void Arowana was swimming in the Origin Black River, and the terrifying aura was permeating, making Ye Tiandu a little dignified.

"What a terrifying Void Arowana, although its aura has not reached the level of the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, it is no less than the other side level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and there is such a creature in the Origin Black River!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly killed the past.

Immediately.

He urged the golden body on the other side, and held the Origin Rule weapon to kill the Void Arowana.

And after the Void Arowana sensed Ye Tian's existence, it also immediately attacked.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides kept fighting, and their strength was even equal.

Of course.

The Void Arowana's attack was relatively simple, so Ye Tian soon gained the upper hand.

At this time.

Ye Tian's entire strength burst out.

Origin Realm Will!

The golden body on the other side!

The magic of the other side!

Origin Rule Weapons!

Even some other side techniques that didn't help, he also used them, just to kill this Void Arowana.

Time flies.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai killed this Void Dragon Fish at the cost of a certain injury, and then took out a Void Dragon Crystal from its body.

"Sure enough, it's a little difficult to get a hundred dragon crystals!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, even if you can't get a hundred Void Dragon Crystals within the allotted time, if the number is about the same, you can still buy them from other Shore-level geniuses.

After all, some other shore-level geniuses knew that they had no hope of passing the assessment, so they might be willing to sell the Void Spirit Dragon Crystal in their hands to obtain some resources.

This is definitely permissible!

But it also depends on luck, you must find a genius who is willing to sell the Void Dragon Crystal, and the number of the other party's Void Dragon Crystal is enough for what you need.

Ye Tian was naturally not prepared to use this method, he definitely wanted to collect a hundred Void Dragon Crystals on his own.

"If you copy your body and slowly find the Void Arowana, and then kill it, one primeval era may not be enough. If you make another copy of the copy body, maybe it will be about the same!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to copy the second copy body.

In this way, the speed of the two replica bodies looking for the Void Dragon Fish here will definitely be much faster, and they can definitely collect a hundred Void Dragon Crystals.

Soon, the second copy of the body was successful.

Swish!

This replica body went to another area to find the Void Arowana.

In the following years, Ye Tian's two replica bodies searched for the Void Arowana in the Origin Black River.

After some time, he found another Void Dragon Fish, and after some fighting, he finally obtained the second Void Dragon Crystal.

......

The years passed.

The time for an primeval era is approaching.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, he had already collected more than one hundred and sixty Void Dragon Crystals, which was not only enough, but also more than sixty Void Dragon Crystals.

If he found a suitable trading partner, he would like to sell the Void Dragon Crystal to the other party.

But the premise is that the price offered by the other party can satisfy him, otherwise he will not sell.

Subsequently.

That's what he was looking for.

However, he found several other shore-level geniuses, none of whom could afford to open the price, and one of them wanted to do something to him and snatch his Void Dragon Crystal, but in the end, the other party found out that he was not an opponent, so he fled.

this day.

Ye Tian once again met a genius of the other side.

"Lord Hiiragi, do you need the Void Dragon Crystal?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Lord of Endless, do you have the Void Dragon Crystal?"

The Lord of Hiiragi frowned slightly.

In his opinion, Ye Tian was only an eighth-time Bone Transformation Realm peer-level genius, and he couldn't even kill a Void Dragon Fish, where did the Void Dragon Crystal come from?

"Of course I have!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and some Void Dragon Crystals appeared in his hands.

After seeing this, the Lord of Hiiragi showed excitement, "Lord of Endless, I still lack thirty-two Void Dragon Crystals, do you have so many Void Dragon Crystals?"

"Of course, there is, but what treasure can the Lord of Hiiragi take out to trade? If it's an ordinary treasure, I can't look down on it!"

Ye Tian said.

The Lord of Hiiragi Leaves pondered for a moment, he also knew that trading thirty-two Void Dragon Crystals from Ye Tian's hands, ordinary treasures would definitely not work, after all, it was about whether he could join Wind Tooth Island!

In case of this level assessment, even the thirty-six other shore-level geniuses have not been gathered, then they don't need to participate in the later assessment, and they will be hired directly.

Therefore, the first level is very important!

"Take that thing out and trade it, or the Lord of Infinity won't want to!"

The Lord of Hiiragi thought to himself.
